Source URL: https://www.score.org/

# SCORE BOSS Resource Index and Routing Map

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, resource-index, boss-routing, houston, 77084, all-stages

## Resource purpose
Master BOSS Library index for SCORE national and SCORE Houston resources. Use this file to understand the structure of the SCORE resource pack and choose the right resource document for an entrepreneur.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Start here when the user asks broadly about SCORE, free business mentoring, business education, templates, workshops, or Houston-area SCORE support. This index maps SCORE resources to the BOSS lifecycle taxonomy and points the model to the more specific file to retrieve next.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages: Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Mature Operations, Growth, Recovery/Troubleshooting, and Exit/Transition.

## Best audience
Aspiring entrepreneurs, existing small business owners, nonprofit founders, and entrepreneurs in the Greater Houston area including ZIP 77084.

## Key resources or subresources
- SCORE Houston Local Resource for 77084 and Greater Houston: 01_SCORE_Houston_local_77084_greater_houston.md — Local chapter routing for Houston/Katy/Greater Houston.
- How Mentoring Works: 02_SCORE_how_mentoring_works_process.md — SCORE mentor request and engagement process.
- What to Expect from Mentoring: 03_SCORE_what_to_expect_mentoring_process.md — Client expectations, mentor role, session preparation.
- Find a Mentor: 04_SCORE_find_a_mentor_process.md — Mentor search by location, expertise, industry, and request session.
- Education and Workshops: 05_SCORE_workshops_events_education_process.md — Live and on-demand training.
- Resource Library Overview: 09_SCORE_resource_library_overview_filter_map.md — Main library filters by topic, stage, industry, entrepreneur type, language, and resource format.
- Template Gallery: 10_SCORE_template_gallery_business_planning_financials.md — Business plan, business model canvas, financial projections, marketing, and operations templates.
- Small Business Resource Hubs: 20_SCORE_small_business_resource_hubs_map.md — Stage, topic, industry, and entrepreneur-group hubs.

## BOSS routing notes
- For Ideation and Validation, prioritize SCORE mentoring, Startup Roadmap, Am I Ready, Market Research, Pricing & Business Model, Target Customer, and Business Model Canvas resources before formation tasks.
- For Formation, use Business Plan, Legal Structure, Licenses & Permits, Register Your Business & EIN, Taxes & Accounting Setup, Financial Readiness, Startup Budget & Projections, and mentor support.
- For Launch, use Marketing Your Launch and Attract Your First Customers, plus workshops or recorded webinars.
- For Mature Operations/Growth, use Manage + Grow hub resources: digital marketing, customer retention, process improvement, technology/AI, supply chain, risk/compliance, cash flow, financial statements, leadership, HR, and employees/contractors.
- For Recovery/Troubleshooting, use Disaster Preparation & Recovery, Risk & Compliance, Cash Flow Management, Process Improvement, and SCORE mentoring.
- For Exit/Transition, use Transition + Exit resources and the Simple Steps for Exiting online course.
- For special eligibility flags, use the Women Entrepreneurs, Veteran Entrepreneurs, and Rural Entrepreneurs hub documents, but do not guarantee program eligibility.
- For Houston-area clients, route to SCORE Houston when they need local mentoring, operator judgment, or a Houston/Katy-area connection. ZIP 77084 is in the west Houston/Katy area and fits the local Houston routing assumption used by this pack.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
